tasks.label: inspect-groundhog-vps-data
tasks.command:
wsl ssh -i /home/honeybadger/.ssh/id_ed25519 root@185.164.110.65 'cd /root/.openclaw/workspace-volo_coding/GroundHog; echo REPO_DATA; ls -lah mvp_backend/obstacle_data mvp_backend/airspace_data; python3 - <<"PY"
import os, sqlite3
for p in ["mvp_backend/obstacle_data/obstacles.sqlite", "mvp_backend/airspace_data/airspace.sqlite"]:
    print(p, os.path.exists(p), os.path.getsize(p) if os.path.exists(p) else 0)
    if os.path.exists(p):
        conn = sqlite3.connect(p)
        table = "obstacles" if "obstacle" in p else "airspace"
        print(table, conn.execute(f"select count(*) from {table}").fetchone()[0])
        conn.close()
PY
'

tasks.label: check-groundhog-other-data

tasks.label: inspect-obstacle-volume
tasks.command:
wsl ssh -i /home/honeybadger/.ssh/id_ed25519 root@185.164.110.65 'for d in /var/lib/docker/volumes/groundhog_groundhog-obstacles/_data /var/lib/docker/volumes/groundhog_groundhog-airspace/_data; do echo === $d ===; ls -lah $d; done; python3 - <<"PY"
import os, sqlite3
paths = [
    ("/var/lib/docker/volumes/groundhog_groundhog-obstacles/_data/obstacles.sqlite", "obstacles"),
    ("/var/lib/docker/volumes/groundhog_groundhog-airspace/_data/airspace.sqlite", "airspace"),
]
for path, table in paths:
    print(path, os.path.exists(path), os.path.getsize(path) if os.path.exists(path) else 0)
    if os.path.exists(path):
        conn = sqlite3.connect(path)
        print(table, conn.execute(f"select count(*) from {table}").fetchone()[0])
        conn.close()
PY'

tasks.label: inspect-dof-format
tasks.command:
wsl ssh -i /home/honeybadger/.ssh/id_ed25519 root@185.164.110.65 'cd /root/.openclaw/workspace-volo_coding/GroundHog; docker compose exec -T groundhog sh -lc "ls -lah /app/mvp_backend/obstacle_data; python3 - <<\"PY\"
import csv
p = '/app/mvp_backend/obstacle_data/DOF.CSV'
with open(p, 'r', encoding='latin-1', errors='ignore') as f:
    r = csv.DictReader(f)
    print('headers:', r.fieldnames)
    for i,row in enumerate(r):
        if i>=3: break
        print('row', i, {k: row.get(k) for k in r.fieldnames[:12]})
PY"'
